transcript.clean_text: on the eve of the final stage of the 109th tour to France wat fat won the time tral jonis fero effectively secured his victory in the yellow Jersey competition and yumbo visma was celebrating for the first time in their history over three and a half minutes of a lead for vagor heading on to the shiz the mostly processional stage with the racing on the final few laps meaning that Denmark could celebrate a first tour victory since 1996 a Super Show 3 weeks possibly the best race ever certainly one of them lfor Arena was the venue for the start of the final 115 km stage just from the west of Paris and its Financial District in and around the iin uden and back into the French capital for a truly remarkable stunning Scenic finish the last day of the men's race was taking place on the first day of the revamped women's race to of H fam a zwift each and every day live and On Demand on Discovery plus and gcn plus as the women finished their first stage of their new race the men began their final stage vingo fat as well as pachard putting on a show even from the first few pedal Strokes the good natured rivalry of this tour continued as did the surprises it was all for show it was a slow procession to Paris with a clink of the champagne glass showing off of brand new artwork on bikes and plenty of celebration for those who've been involved yo visma made their tour debuts in 1984 this was their first Victory after a few Podium places in the last few years once the Riders got P to l cross the finish line for the first time the racing really began one more stage up for grabs 50 OD kilm to race up and down one of the most famous boulevards in the whole of Sport the France were in town the national color shown off and the message of Liber eal fraternity perhaps meaningful more than ever in the world of cycling time for the first attacks with 30 OD km to go they came they went and they were launched again no group really able to get a gap until this one went just inside 30 km from the finish the F education easy post Kama fdg and borans all committed they managed to get just under 30 seconds but were brought back by the time it was time for the last lap on the final lap there was an attack from pipo Gana launched by Third Place finisher garine Thomas and T poacha true to his word true to his attacking spirit and entertaining nature would also have a go but the Sprint teams wanted this opportunity too much they continue to work and work hard they would all the way to the line to set things up through Norwegian Corner onto the rout of rivi BL Concord the final right turn with 700 M to go nowadays and it would be bike exchange who lead it out for Dylan kruna he started his Sprint early too early perhaps as yasper Philips could come around him Peter sagam was launching Alexander Kristoff was there or thereabouts but it would be Philipa who would hold on to it with Huna and Kristoff there are thereabouts Philips are taking his second stage win of the tour to France a brilliant result for the Alpine Phenix man from Belgium KB boxed in a little bit Phillips and the clear winner nobody else in the picture Phillips are beating CLA Kristoff Starvin and Sagan with lok the Parisian in sixth place celebrations just behind them for team Yambo fisma what for not not deciding to contest the Sprint this year instead rolling home with yones vagor who won the Tour to France ahead of T pogacha and garant Thomas finishing on the podium at 36 years of age super scenes on the sh and yonas vagor the first Danish winner since 1996 the final top 10 looking like this goodu fourth vlasov in fifth on debut with kintana taking home another top 10 wadf will win the green jersey the biggest points margin in the modern era and poacha the best young rider for the third year running this time it wouldn't be yellow as well but a brilliant white jersey win for the young Slovenia jonis finger was also the king of the mountains the third year running that the GC winner was also the Race's best climber the team classification this year taken home by any grenadiers one of the few teams to finish with eight men they took a stage win through Tom pitcock and gar Thomas finished third the super com the most combative Rider of the whole race was wat forite and the tour finished in Paris for yet another year sun setting on a wonderful men's tour 109th edition of the race one of the most memorable the racing continues though on Discovery plus and GC CN plus with the to of FR fam aex zwift live and on the mat
